scripts.db:up: pnpm --filter "@platform/db-postgres" pg:migrate && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-clickhouse" ch:up && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-weaviate" wv:migrate
scripts.seed: pnpm --filter "@platform/db-postgres" pg:seed && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-clickhouse" ch:seed && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-weaviate" wv:seed
scripts.migrate: pnpm --filter "@platform/db-postgres" pg:migrate && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-clickhouse" ch:up && pnpm --filter "@platform/db-weaviate" wv:migrate
scripts.reset: pnpm clean && pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm db:reset
scripts.catchup: pnpm clean && pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm db:up
